name: Sanji - OP09-065 (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] You may return 1 or more DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck: This Character gains [Rush] during this turn. Then, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 6 or less.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
